description_long: This is a modern wooden bench with a rectangular seat and a distinctive Z-shaped support structure on each side. The bench is constructed from richly grained wood, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The seat is flat and broad, suitable for multiple people, and the edges are cleanly finished. The legs are angled and connected by a horizontal stretcher at the base, providing both stability and a unique visual profile. There are no backrests or armrests, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for both public and private urban spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden bench with Z-shaped angled supports and a flat seat, featuring a warm wood grain and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Z-shaped angled support and the thickness of the wooden seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flat seat and the two sturdy angled legs connected by a horizontal stretcher.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the Z-shaped support and the clean edge of the seat.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the seat and the connecting stretcher at the base.
attribute_leg_design: angled Z-shaped wooden supports with a horizontal stretcher
